subcodes.first_line: O thou myriad nightingale of the garden of praise and glorification, whose soul-melting melodies from a burning throat in the rose-garden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای هزار هزاردستان گلزار نعت و ثناء نغمات جانگدازی که از حنجر جانسوز در گلشن
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
